description: Skin the model to automatically generate face groups.

keywords.name: break-angle
keywords.description: Specify the angle that is used to determine face contiguity for inclusion in a skin group. The default break angle is 45 degrees.

keywords.name: internal
keywords.description: Include internal faces when creating face groups. This will assign group names to faces along internal boundaries where the zone group assignments change. The default is off .

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Identify the slot that contains the groups to be used for consideration of contiguity. Use of the group logic is described in Groups . If this keyword is omitted, zone group assignments will be ignored and the internal keyword will not do anything. Use the the special any slot assignment to use all slots.

keywords.name: slot-skin
keywords.description: Place the groups created by this command in a slot named s . If this keyword is omitted, the groups will be place in a slot named skin .

keywords.name: use-hidden-zones
keywords.description: Include faces that are on currently hidden zones if they are within the range. By default this values is off .
